summary: Composition planning dialect — decomposes a request into an ordered sequence of Graffiticode language ids (a linear pipeline). Internal; not a user-facing authoring dialect.
in_scope: Deciding whether a request needs one language or a composed pipeline
Producing an ordered language sequence: `plan ["<id>" ...]` -> { langs: [...] }
Adding a downstream stage when a language describes-but-does-not-author a content type another language produces
out_of_scope: Authoring any content itself (the listed languages do that)
Per-stage prompts, sub-tasks, or any value beyond the language sequence
Branching pipelines — composition is strictly linear (head consumes the next, recursively)
